title: Japanese-Style Fermented Potato Salad
description: A creative twist on traditional potato salad, incorporating Japanese flavors and a fermented twist. Perfect for a light and refreshing side dish.
instructions: Boil the potatoes until tender, then set aside to cool.
In a large bowl, whisk together the fermented rice vinegar, soy sauce, sugar, and salt.
Add the cooled potatoes, pickled carrots, green onions, and crispy sesame seeds to the bowl.
Toss everything together until well combined.
Season with additional soy sauce or sugar to taste.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve chilled or at room temperature.
